__fixture__.name: derived_explanation_citation
__fixture__.scenario: An AI-explanation overlay paragraph paraphrases how workspace_trust::WorkspaceTrustState interacts with the editor.format_on_save setting. The overlay mints a derived_explanation anchor with derivation=derived_with_upstream_anchors and retains two upstream anchors: one project_docs symbol_reference_anchor and one generated_reference_anchor for the setting. A reviewer reconstructing the exported paragraph can recover both upstream rows from pack_id + pack_revision_ref + target_ref on each upstream anchor. If the overlay had shipped with an empty upstream_citation_anchor_refs array, the publisher would deny render with derived_explanation_uncited.
contract_sections: Reuse rules across surfaces -> AI-explanation overlays
Derived explanations never appear as uncited primary authority
__fixture__.note: The record's anchor_kind is symbol_reference_anchor because the rendered row binds to a project symbol; the derivation field carries the 'this row is derived' posture. target_ref names the symbol the paragraph paraphrases against; upstream_citation_anchor_refs carry the two authoritative anchors the paragraph derives from.
